name: Lockdown Rishtey
overview: Lockdown Rishtey is a unique series shot on mobile phones during the complete Lockdown months of April, May and June from different locations of India. All the actors were at different places, but were shot in such a manner that they all appear to be at the same

trailers.title: Lockdown Rishtey | Official Trailer | Drama | MX Exclusive Series | MX Player
